description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 14, 2024 at 5:04 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in South San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a pickup truck (Chevrolet El Camino) on El Camino Real at Westborough Boulevard. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwest on El Camino Real when it came to a stop behind a queue of traffic in the rightmost dedicated left 
turn lane at the intersection with Westborough Boulevard. Simultaneously, a pickup truck was traveling southeast on El Camino Real in the 
center of three lanes when a passenger car entered the center southeast lane from a driveway to the right of the pickup truck. As the 
passenger car entered the center southeast lane just in front of the pickup truck, the pickup truck swerved to the left, crossing the curbed 
median. The front of the pickup truck then made contact with the rear driver side of the stopped Waymo AV and with the rear driver side of 
another pickup truck traveling two lanes to the right of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was 
engaged in autonomous mode. All three vehicles sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
